beats.text: Dad crosses the threshold of his own backyard at a gentle diagonal.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Hey — hey babe, hey — whoa, sprinkler. Okay.

choices.text: Commit to the bit. Greet everyone too loudly.

end_a.text: Barb mouths the word 'heat' like it's a slur.

end_b.text: "DOUUUUG! BRENDAAAA! THE GIRLS!" A child begins to cry. It's unclear which one.
